statementOfOffence.title: Possess / control TV set with intent another use install without a licence
statementOfOffence.welshTitle: Meddu ar/mewn rheolaeth set deledu gan fwriadu i unigolyn arall ei ddefnyddio/osod heb drwydded
statementOfOffence.legislation: Contrary to section 363(3)(b) and (4) of the Communications Act 2003.
statementOfOffence.welshLegislation: Yn groes i adran 363(3)(b) a (4) Deddf Cyfathrebu 2003.

offences.offenceWording: Aggravated vehicle taking - ( driver did not take ) and vehicle damage of £5000 or over.

statementOfOffence.title: Drive motor vehicle fail comply with red / green arrow / lane closure light signals - automatic equipment
statementOfOffence.welshTitle: Gyrru c / m a methu â chydymffurfio ag arwyddion golau - saeth goch / saeth werdd / lonydd ar gau – cyfarpar awtomatig
statementOfOffence.legislation: Contrary to section 36(1) of the Road Traffic Act 1988, the Traffic Signs Regulations and General Directions 2016 and Schedule 2 to the Road Traffic Offenders Act 1988.
statementOfOffence.welshLegislation: Yn groes i adran 36(1) Deddf Traffig Ffyrdd 1988, Rheoliadau a Chyfarwyddiadau Cyffredinol Arwyddion Traffig 2016 ac Atodlen 2 Deddf Troseddwyr Traffig Ffyrdd 1988.

offences.offenceWording: Attempt to cause a male aged 13 or over to engage in sexual activity - no penetration.

statementOfOffence.title: Attempt to cause a male aged 13 or over to engage in sexual activity - no penetration
statementOfOffence.welshTitle: Attempt to cause a male aged 13 or over to engage in sexual activity - no penetration
statementOfOffence.legislation: Contrary to section 1(1) of the Criminal Attempts Act 1981.

reportingRestrictions.label: Complainant's anonymity protected by virtue of Section 1 of the Sexual Offences Amendment Act 1992
